ToolInvocationContext.description: Per-call context passed to every tool. The new field is outputBudget; remaining fields are inherited unchanged from the existing framework.

outputBudget.description: Hard token ceiling for the tool's returned string. Computed by the framework per DD-2 / DD-10. Tools must self-bound to this number.

ToolResult.description: Unchanged. Tool result is a single string; no new fields. Truncation is signalled by a trailing natural-language hint inside the same string (DD-1).

text.description: Tool output, possibly suffixed with [Truncated] hint when self-bounded.

TruncationHint.description: Conventions the trailing hint MUST satisfy when a tool self-bounded its output (DD-3). Not a wire schema; the hint is plain text.
rules: Hint is the last 1-3 lines of the tool result string
Contains exactly one of the literal anchor tokens: '[Truncated]', '[Output truncated]', or '[輸出已截斷]'
Includes a fraction or extent (e.g. 'lines 1-1500 of 8421', 'matches 1-50 of 412')
Includes a concrete arg adjustment using the tool's existing parameter names (e.g. 'Use offset=1500 to continue.', 'Narrow your pattern.', 'Use msgIdx_from=200.')
Locale follows session locale (English or Traditional Chinese)
examples: [Truncated] Showing lines 1-1500 of 8421. Use offset=1500 to continue.
[輸出已截斷] 顯示 1500/8421 行。要看後續請以 offset=1500 重 call。
[Truncated] 50 of 412 grep matches shown. Narrow your pattern (consider adding path filter).
[Truncated] Subsession messages 1-180 of 423. Use msgIdx_from=180 for the rest.

tool_output_budget_default.description: Number-or-ratio. If absent: min(round(model.context * 0.3), 50_000). Ratio form (e.g. '0.3') resolves against active model.context.

tool_output_budget.<tool_name>.description: Per-tool override. Same number-or-ratio shape as default.

chunked_digest_chunk_target_tokens.description: Target chunk size submitted to the digesting LLM during chunked-digest.

chunked_digest_max_chunks.description: Hard ceiling on chunk count. Exceeding raises E_DIGEST_TOO_LARGE.

verify_after_compact.description: Whether the verify-after-compact step runs. Default true; only false for diagnostic replay.

ChunkedDigestRequest.description: The composite payload built per chunk and sent to the digesting LLM (DD-7).

digest_so_far.description: Accumulated digest from chunks 1..k-1 (empty object on k=1).

chunk_payload.description: Round-aligned slice of the message stream — closed (user, assistant-with-tool-calls-resolved) pairs.

framing_prompt.description: Canonical instruction text re-roling the model from executor to digester. Two variants exist: standard and stricter (used on retry).

Digest.description: JSON-shaped digest produced per chunk (DD-7) and merged across chunks. Final merged form is written verbatim into an Anchor message body.

entities.description: Notable entities (files, modules, accounts, sessions, plan slugs) referenced in the chunk.

context.description: Short note on why this entity is relevant.

decisions.description: Resolved decisions or commits; each entry is a one-line statement plus optional source pointer.

source.description: Optional pointer such as commit hash or message id.

open_threads.description: Unresolved questions or partially-explored options that the next iteration may need.

FramingPromptVariant.description: Identifier for which framing prompt variant is used.

CompactionKind.description: Updated KIND_CHAIN identifiers (DD-5). New entry chunked-digest sits at the tail.

CompactionRunResult.description: Return shape from SessionCompaction.run after chain walk + verify (DD-9).

VariableSizeToolRegistry.description: Tools recognised as variable-size (subject to ctx.outputBudget enforcement). Maintained in the enablement registry alongside short_output_tools for symmetry.
